arguments.name: Hash Type
arguments.description: Hash-type code, see hashcat --help for full list (otherwise autodetect)

arguments.name: Attack Mode
arguments.description: Attack-mode to use for cracking (0=Straight, 1=Combination, 3=Brute-force, 6=Hybrid Wordlist+Mask, 7=Hybrid Mask+Wordlist, 9=Association)

arguments.name: Version
arguments.description: Display version information

arguments.name: Help
arguments.description: Print help, use -hh to show all supported hash-modes

arguments.name: Quiet
arguments.description: Suppress output

arguments.name: Hex Charset
arguments.description: Assume charset given in hexadecimal

arguments.name: Hex Salt
arguments.description: Assume salt provided in hexadecimal

arguments.name: Hex Wordlist
arguments.description: Assume words in wordlist are given in hex

arguments.name: Force
arguments.description: Ignore warnings

arguments.name: Deprecated Check Disable
arguments.description: Enable deprecated plugins

arguments.name: Status
arguments.description: Enable automatic update of the status screen

arguments.name: Status JSON
arguments.description: Enable JSON format for status output

arguments.name: Status Timer
arguments.description: Sets seconds between status screen updates to X

arguments.name: Stdin Timeout Abort
arguments.description: Abort if there is no input from stdin for X seconds

arguments.name: Machine Readable
arguments.description: Display the status view in a machine-readable format

arguments.name: Keep Guessing
arguments.description: Keep guessing the hash after it has been cracked

arguments.name: Color Cracked
arguments.description: Enables color output for cracked hashes

arguments.name: Self-Test Disable
arguments.description: Disable self-test functionality on startup

arguments.name: Session
arguments.description: Define specific session name

arguments.name: Restore
arguments.description: Restore session from --session

arguments.name: Restore Disable
arguments.description: Do not write restore file

arguments.name: Restore File Path
arguments.description: Specific path to restore file

arguments.name: Output File
arguments.description: Define outfile for recovered hash

arguments.name: Outfile Format
arguments.description: Outfile format to use, separated with commas

arguments.name: Outfile JSON
arguments.description: Force JSON format in outfile format

arguments.name: Outfile Autohex Disable
arguments.description: Disable the use of $HEX[] in output plains

arguments.name: Outfile Check Timer
arguments.description: Sets seconds between outfile checks to X

arguments.name: Separator
arguments.description: Separator char for hashlists and outfile

arguments.name: Show
arguments.description: Compare hashlist with potfile; show cracked hashes

arguments.name: Left
arguments.description: Compare hashlist with potfile; show uncracked hashes

arguments.name: Username
arguments.description: Enable ignoring of usernames in hashfile

arguments.name: Dynamic X
arguments.description: Ignore $dynamic_X$ prefix in hashes

arguments.name: Remove
arguments.description: Enable removal of hashes once they are cracked

arguments.name: Remove Timer
arguments.description: Update input hash file each X seconds

arguments.name: Wordlist Autohex Disable
arguments.description: Disable the conversion of $HEX[] from the wordlist

arguments.name: Potfile Disable
arguments.description: Do not write potfile

arguments.name: Potfile Path
arguments.description: Specific path to potfile

arguments.name: Encoding From
arguments.description: Force internal wordlist encoding from X

arguments.name: Encoding To
arguments.description: Force internal wordlist encoding to X

arguments.name: Markov hcstat2
arguments.description: Specify hcstat2 file to use

arguments.name: Markov Disable
arguments.description: Disables markov-chains, emulates classic brute-force

arguments.name: Markov Classic
arguments.description: Enables classic markov-chains, no per-position

arguments.name: Markov Inverse
arguments.description: Enables inverse markov-chains, no per-position

arguments.name: Markov Threshold
arguments.description: Threshold X when to stop accepting new markov-chains

arguments.name: Metal Compiler Runtime
arguments.description: Abort Metal kernel build after X seconds of runtime

arguments.name: Runtime
arguments.description: Abort session after X seconds of runtime

arguments.name: Debug Mode
arguments.description: Defines the debug mode (hybrid only by using rules)

arguments.name: Debug File
arguments.description: Output file for debugging rules

arguments.name: Logfile Disable
arguments.description: Disable the logfile

arguments.name: Induction Directory
arguments.description: Specify the induction directory to use for loopback

arguments.name: Outfile Check Directory
arguments.description: Specify the directory to monitor 3rd party outfiles

arguments.name: Loopback
arguments.description: Add new plains to induct directory

arguments.name: HCCAPX Message Pair
arguments.description: Load only message pairs from hccapx matching X

arguments.name: Nonce Error Corrections
arguments.description: The BF size range to replace AP's nonce last bytes

arguments.name: Keyboard Layout Mapping
arguments.description: Keyboard layout mapping table for special hash-modes

arguments.name: TrueCrypt Keyfiles
arguments.description: Keyfiles to use, separated with commas

arguments.name: VeraCrypt Keyfiles
arguments.description: Keyfiles to use, separated with commas

arguments.name: VeraCrypt PIM Start
arguments.description: VeraCrypt personal iterations multiplier start

arguments.name: VeraCrypt PIM Stop
arguments.description: VeraCrypt personal iterations multiplier stop

arguments.name: Benchmark
arguments.description: Run benchmark of selected hash-modes

arguments.name: Benchmark All
arguments.description: Run benchmark of all hash-modes (requires -b)

arguments.name: Benchmark Min
arguments.description: Set benchmark min hash-mode (requires -b)

arguments.name: Benchmark Max
arguments.description: Set benchmark max hash-mode (requires -b)

arguments.name: Speed Only
arguments.description: Return expected speed of the attack, then quit

arguments.name: Progress Only
arguments.description: Return ideal progress step size and time to process

arguments.name: Segment Size
arguments.description: Sets size in MB to cache from the wordfile to X

arguments.name: Bitmap Min
arguments.description: Sets minimum bits allowed for bitmaps to X

arguments.name: Bitmap Max
arguments.description: Sets maximum bits allowed for bitmaps to X

arguments.name: Bridge Parameter 1
arguments.description: Sets the generic parameter 1 for a Bridge

arguments.name: Bridge Parameter 2
arguments.description: Sets the generic parameter 2 for a Bridge

arguments.name: Bridge Parameter 3
arguments.description: Sets the generic parameter 3 for a Bridge

arguments.name: Bridge Parameter 4
arguments.description: Sets the generic parameter 4 for a Bridge

arguments.name: CPU Affinity
arguments.description: Locks to CPU devices, separated with commas

arguments.name: Hook Threads
arguments.description: Sets number of threads for a hook (per compute unit)

arguments.name: Hash Info
arguments.description: Show information for each hash-mode

arguments.name: Backend Ignore CUDA
arguments.description: Do not try to open CUDA interface on startup

arguments.name: Backend Ignore HIP
arguments.description: Do not try to open HIP interface on startup

arguments.name: Backend Ignore Metal
arguments.description: Do not try to open Metal interface on startup

arguments.name: Backend Ignore OpenCL
arguments.description: Do not try to open OpenCL interface on startup

arguments.name: Backend Info
arguments.description: Show system/environment/backend API info

arguments.name: Backend Devices
arguments.description: Backend devices to use, separated with commas

arguments.name: Backend Devices Virtual Multi
arguments.description: Spawn X virtual instances on a real device

arguments.name: Backend Devices Virtual Host
arguments.description: Sets the real device to create virtual instances

arguments.name: Backend Devices Keep Free
arguments.description: Keep specified percentage of device memory free

arguments.name: OpenCL Device Types
arguments.description: OpenCL device-types to use, separated with commas (1=CPU, 2=GPU, 3=FPGA)

arguments.name: Optimized Kernel Enable
arguments.description: Enable optimized kernels (limits password length)

arguments.name: Multiply Accel Disable
arguments.description: Disable multiply kernel-accel with processor count

arguments.name: Workload Profile
arguments.description: Enable a specific workload profile (1=Low, 2=Default, 3=High, 4=Nightmare)

arguments.name: Kernel Accel
arguments.description: Manual workload tuning, set outerloop step size to X

arguments.name: Kernel Loops
arguments.description: Manual workload tuning, set innerloop step size to X

arguments.name: Kernel Threads
arguments.description: Manual workload tuning, set thread count to X

arguments.name: Backend Vector Width
arguments.description: Manually override backend vector-width to X

arguments.name: Spin Damp
arguments.description: Use CPU for device synchronization, in percent

arguments.name: Hardware Monitor Disable
arguments.description: Disable temperature and fanspeed reads and triggers

arguments.name: Hardware Monitor Temp Abort
arguments.description: Abort if temperature reaches X degrees Celsius

arguments.name: Scrypt TMTO
arguments.description: Manually override TMTO value for scrypt to X

arguments.name: Skip
arguments.description: Skip X words from the start

arguments.name: Limit
arguments.description: Limit X words from the start plus skipped words

arguments.name: Keyspace
arguments.description: Show keyspace base:mod values and quit

arguments.name: Total Candidates
arguments.description: Show total candidate count (base*mod) and quit

arguments.name: Rule Left
arguments.description: Single rule applied to each word from left wordlist

arguments.name: Rule Right
arguments.description: Single rule applied to each word from right wordlist

arguments.name: Rules File
arguments.description: Multiple rules applied to each word from wordlists

arguments.name: Generate Rules
arguments.description: Generate X random rules

arguments.name: Generate Rules Func Min
arguments.description: Force min X functions per rule

arguments.name: Generate Rules Func Max
arguments.description: Force max X functions per rule

arguments.name: Generate Rules Func Sel
arguments.description: Pool of rule operators valid for random rule engine

arguments.name: Generate Rules Seed
arguments.description: Force RNG seed set to X

arguments.name: Custom Charset 1
arguments.description: User-defined charset ?1

arguments.name: Custom Charset 2
arguments.description: User-defined charset ?2

arguments.name: Custom Charset 3
arguments.description: User-defined charset ?3

arguments.name: Custom Charset 4
arguments.description: User-defined charset ?4

arguments.name: Custom Charset 5
arguments.description: User-defined charset ?5

arguments.name: Custom Charset 6
arguments.description: User-defined charset ?6

arguments.name: Custom Charset 7
arguments.description: User-defined charset ?7

arguments.name: Custom Charset 8
arguments.description: User-defined charset ?8

arguments.name: Identify
arguments.description: Shows all supported algorithms for input hashes

arguments.name: Increment
arguments.description: Enable mask increment mode

arguments.name: Increment Inverse
arguments.description: Increment from right-to-left

arguments.name: Increment Min
arguments.description: Start mask incrementing at X

arguments.name: Increment Max
arguments.description: Stop mask incrementing at X

arguments.name: Slow Candidates
arguments.description: Enable slower (but advanced) candidate generators

arguments.name: Stdout
arguments.description: Do not crack a hash, instead print candidates only

arguments.name: Bypass Delay
arguments.description: Seconds delay between checking bypass threshold

arguments.name: Bypass Threshold
arguments.description: Minimum amount of founds to avoid being bypassed

arguments.name: Brain Server
arguments.description: Enable brain server

arguments.name: Brain Server Timer
arguments.description: Update the brain server dump each X seconds (min:60)

arguments.name: Brain Client
arguments.description: Enable brain client, activates -S

arguments.name: Brain Client Features
arguments.description: Define brain client features

arguments.name: Brain Host
arguments.description: Brain server host (IP or domain)

arguments.name: Brain Port
arguments.description: Brain server port

arguments.name: Brain Password
arguments.description: Brain server authentication password

arguments.name: Brain Session
arguments.description: Overrides automatically calculated brain session

arguments.name: Brain Session Whitelist
arguments.description: Allow given sessions only, separated with commas

arguments.name: Hash File
arguments.description: Hash value or file containing hashes to crack

arguments.name: Wordlist or Mask
arguments.description: Wordlist file, directory of wordlists, or mask for brute-force attack
